rationale: Interior weatherproofing must follow structural repair + sealing.
Body panels/windows/seals must be available for final fit.
Electrical baseline must pass before integration validation.
Mechanical safety baseline must close before road validation.
Interior finish closes before final integration.
Body rust work and baseline wiring can run in parallel.
Body closure and mechanical service can run in parallel.
Panel refurbish return tracking can run while electrical finalization continues.
